3121910.name: Citrus Tower
3121910.description:
Welcome to the Citrus Tower. Get to the top, or die trying.

24-Player Cyberdelic Action RPG

Citrus Tower is a multiplayer action RPG with PvPvE elements.

  • Fight through a shifting, mysterious tower's 50+ floors.

  • You start with only bosses in your path, but you’ll also face other players. Ally with them, or betray them. The choice is yours.

  • The tower is procedurally generated, ensuring no two ascents are alike.

  • Up to 24 players in a single session

  • Sprinkled in between randomly-generated floors are handmade ones, known as "static" floors. These floors often have their own objectives that must be cleared before you can enter the next floor.

Climb. Kill. Die. Reincarnate. Again.

Death is not the end, but rather a transformation.

  • When you fall, be it at the hands of a player, enemy, or your own folly, you return to the very first floor. Reborn with shuffled stats, new challenges await.

  • The tower remembers your efforts: defeated bosses stay down, puzzles remain solved. But beware, your death spawns a hostile creature where you fell for you and your fellow climbers to deal with.

Uncover the truth behind the tower

The tower hides a secret.

  • Piece together its story through NPC dialogue and scattered documents.

  • Each ascent reveals more, but only persistence will uncover the full truth.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
